title: AgentCapability
description: A declared capability an agent can advertise (e.g. entity_resolution, ocr). Capabilities are the unit of matching between AgentTask.required_capabilities and an agent's registered capabilities in platform/agents/registry/capabilities.yaml.

capability_id.description: Canonical snake_case capability identifier, unique across the platform.

input_schema_ref.description: Reference to the JSON Schema describing valid inputs for this capability, if any.

output_schema_ref.description: Reference to the JSON Schema describing valid outputs for this capability, if any.

examples.name: Entity Resolution
examples.description: Resolves observed attributes to canonical Entity records.
